ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing type */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being tested */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing protocol used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who performed the test */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the test */,
  "testing_number" REAL /* Unique testing number assigned to each test */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, in-progress, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_testing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_type_id") REFERENCES testing_types ("testing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_types" (
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing type */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default protocol for this testing type */,
  "testing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Standard unit of measurement for this testing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_types_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material type */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provided the sample */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the sample */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was manufactured */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_material_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_type_id") REFERENCES material_types ("material_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material type */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the material type */,
  "material_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test that generated this result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the result */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the result */,
  "s_value" REAL /* S value of the test result */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E value of the test result */,
  "i1_value" REAL /* I1 value of the test result */,
  "i2_value" REAL /* I2 value of the test result */,
  "h_value" REAL /* H value of the test result */,
  "r_value" REAL /* R value of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
